captions.x: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding was so secret, guests like Ed Sheeran and Bradley Cooper reportedly signed NDAs! Will the details ever leak? #TaylorSwift #TravisKelce

spoken: Ed Sheeran and Bradley Cooper were seen arriving at a wedding this week. It was for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, who tied the knot in New York. The couple reportedly made every guest sign an NDA. The nuptials happened at Madison Square Garden, per the Associated Press. Other A-listers spotted included Gigi Hadid, Zoë Kravitz, and Dakota Johnson. Digital invitations were watermarked with guest names. The couple announced their engagement last August. Kelce once told GQ he finally had a partner who understood the scrutiny. But will the NDAs actually keep the details secret?
